---
title: "Theses Supervision"
---

## Past Theses:

1. **Emanuele Ribecco**: "Apprendimento federato per la classificazione di immagini su dati IID e non-IID", (B.Sc. Computer Science)
2. **Davide Mento**: "Metodologie distribuite per la classificazione di grandi set di dati", (B.Sc. Computer Science)
3. **Mattia Musarra Tubbi**: "Curriculum Reinforcement Learning for Humanoid Robot Stand-UP", (B.Sc. Computer Science)

## Present Theses:

3. **Manuel Rosario Sciuto**: "Data-Driven OS Scheduling through eBPF and PyTorch"
4. **Adel Shatani**: TbD

## Available Thesis and Apprenticeship Topics

*. Multi-Agent simulator with namespace in C++
*. Namespace isolation in ZephyrOS
*. Containerization for eFPGA SoC (Quicklogic EoS S3)
*. Resource isolation for heterogeneous SoC (STM32Mp2)

*. Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) in MuJoCo


**Note.** Feel free to contact me by email to propose your thesis idea.
